<?php /* * This file is part of the Fidry CPUCounter Config package. * * (c) Théo FIDRY <theo.fidry@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Fidry\CpuCoreCounter; use RuntimeException; final class NumberOfCpuCoreNotFound extends RuntimeException { public static function create(): self { return new self( 'Could not find the number of CPU cores available.' ); } }
